nameMeanings.name: Langdon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, for example in Devon, Dorset, Essex, Kent, and Warwickshire, so named from Old English lang, long ‘long’ + dūn ‘hill’. See also Longden .

History: Samuel Langdon, Harvard College president in 1774–80, was born in Boston, MA, in 1723 but lived out his years in Hampton Falls, NH. Three of his children left descendants. His grandfather Philip (born 1646) had came from Braunton in Devon, England, and was married in Andover, Essex County, MA, in 1684. Another early Langdon immigrant was Tobias Langdon, who came to North America before 1660 and settled in Portsmouth, NH. His great-grandson John was a revolutionary war leader, US senator, and NH governor.

variants.name: Longden
meanings: English: habitational name, perhaps from Longendale in Derbyshire. The placename must originally have been Old English lang ‘long’ + denu ‘valley’, to which Old English dæl ‘dale, valley’ was tautologically added. The surname Longden would then represent either the original placename or a shortened form of the longer one.

variants.name: Landon
meanings: English: habitational name from Lavendon (Buckinghamshire), which is recorded as Laundone in 1232 and Lavenden alias Launden in 1639. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Lāfa (genitive Lāfan) + Old English denu ‘valley’.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Lando, a short form of compound names based on the element land ‘land, territory’, via the oblique case, Landonis.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John Langdon was born in 1330, in Williton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1375, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Langdonは1330年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトウィリトンで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1375年にイギリスイギリスデボングレアト フウルフォードで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Langdon(은)는 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 윌리턴에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.
